info.title: RabbitMQ Management HTTP API
info.description: The RabbitMQ Management Plugin provides an HTTP-based API for monitoring and management of RabbitMQ nodes and clusters. All URIs are under /api/ and require HTTP basic authentication (guest/guest by default on a fresh install).

get.description: Various bits of information that describe the whole system.

post.description: Perform actions on a queue (e.g., sync/cancel_sync for mirrored queues).

get.description: Export all server definitions (users, vhosts, permissions, exchanges, queues, bindings, policies).

post.description: Import server definitions. Existing objects may be updated.

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic authentication with RabbitMQ user credentials

tags.description: Comma-separated list: administrator, monitoring, policymaker, management, none
